name: gitops-cost-estimator
description: Automated cloud cost visibility for infrastructure changes with multi-cloud support (AWS, Azure, GCP)

scripts.estimate:aws: cd infra/aws && terraform init && terraform plan -out=tfplan && infracost breakdown --path tfplan --format json
scripts.estimate:azure: cd infra/azure && terraform init && terraform plan -out=tfplan && infracost breakdown --path tfplan --format json
scripts.estimate:gcp: cd infra/gcp && terraform init && terraform plan -out=tfplan && infracost breakdown --path tfplan --format json
scripts.docs: echo 'GitOps Cost Estimator Documentation' && cat README.md

author: Your Name
